name: codeimpact-html-runtime-security-check
description: Dev-only jsdom harness (#28, ADR-8.10) that executes the REAL emitted report JS (codeimpact_secondaries::gateways::report_writers::html::assets::JS) against an adversarial data island and asserts the runtime security invariants a purely static gate cannot see: no code execution, no markup parsing, Object.prototype hygiene, and numeric clamping. Invoked exclusively from the Rust integration test suite (tests/html_renderer_runtime_security_test.rs) via `node check.mjs <html-file>` — never part of the Cargo build graph, never shipped.
